sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n951" key="a)grupnhte/on" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀγρυπν-ητέον</orth>, <sense id="n951.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">one must watch</tr_>, Eust <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">168.16</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
